name: Crisp Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not pack the flour.
2. To make sour milk, place 1 tablespoon vinegar in a measuring cup and fill to the 1 cup mark with milk.
3. Beat eggs with a rotary or electric beater until frothy.
4. Add milk and shortening, stirring to combine.
5. Add sugar and baking soda, beating with a beater until lumps are small but batter is not smooth.
6. Pour batter onto a heated waffle baker and bake.
